hero.title: Carbon reporting that
hero.description: GreenLedger automates ESG data collection, emissions calculation, and compliance reporting. Upload documents, and our AI handles the rest — from extraction to audit-ready reports.
hero.socialProof: Trusted by 200+ companies for ESG compliance

painPoints.title: ESG compliance shouldn't feel like this
painPoints.description: Most teams waste hundreds of hours on manual data collection and spreadsheet gymnastics
painPoints.manual: Manual data entry from hundreds of invoices and utility bills
painPoints.spreadsheets: Spreadsheets that break when formulas get complex
painPoints.frameworks: Confusing framework requirements that change yearly

howItWorks.title: Three steps to compliance
howItWorks.description: From raw documents to audit-ready reports in minutes, not months

step1.title: Upload Documents
step1.description: Drag & drop utility bills, invoices, fuel receipts, and more. We accept PDFs, images, spreadsheets, and Word documents.

step2.title: AI Extracts & Calculates
step2.description: Our AI reads documents in any language, extracts emissions data with 98%+ accuracy, and calculates your carbon footprint automatically.

step3.title: Generate Reports
step3.description: One-click reports for CSRD, GRI, SASB, and ISSB. Fully audit-trailed and ready for submission.

features.title: Everything you need for ESG compliance
features.description: A complete platform that replaces spreadsheets, consultants, and manual processes

aiExtraction.title: AI Document Extraction
aiExtraction.description: Upload any document in any language. Our AI extracts emissions data with 98%+ accuracy and creates audit trails automatically.

multiFramework.title: Multi-Framework Reporting
multiFramework.description: Generate reports for CSRD, GRI, SASB, and ISSB from a single data source. No duplicate data entry required.

scopeTracking.title: Scope 1, 2 & 3 Tracking
scopeTracking.description: Comprehensive GHG Protocol tracking across all emission scopes with automatic factor lookup and calculation.

auditTrail.title: Full Audit Trail
auditTrail.description: Every data point is traced back to its source document. Complete change history for auditor confidence.

supplierManagement.title: Supplier Management
supplierManagement.description: Track supplier ESG risk, collect Scope 3 data, and manage your supply chain sustainability.

integrations.title: QuickBooks Integration
integrations.description: Auto-import financial data from QuickBooks. Transactions are automatically mapped to emission categories.

testimonials.title: Trusted by sustainability leaders
testimonials.description: See how companies like yours simplified their ESG compliance

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.description: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees.

enterprise.name: Enterprise

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about GreenLedger

items.q: How quickly can I get started?
items.a: Most teams are up and running within 10 minutes. Upload your first document, and our AI extracts emissions data in seconds.

items.q: Which compliance frameworks do you support?
items.a: GreenLedger supports CSRD (EU), GRI Standards, SASB, and ISSB. We regularly add new frameworks as regulations evolve.
Absolutely. All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.2+). We maintain full audit logs, role-based access controls, and multi-tenant data isolation.

items.q: Can I connect my accounting software?
items.a: Yes — our QuickBooks integration auto-imports financial data that feeds directly into emissions calculations. More integrations coming soon.

items.q: What if I need help with my first report?
items.a: Our support team is here to help. Professional and Enterprise plans include priority support to guide you through your first compliance report.
Annual pricing with a 20% discount is coming soon. Contact us to be notified when it becomes available.

cta.title: Ready to simplify your ESG compliance?

cta.note: No credit card required · 14-day free trial · Cancel anytime
